name: Potato Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and mash a medium potato without any seasoning, butter, or milk.
2. Measure 1/3 cup of the mashed potatoes.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together.
4. Blend the melted mixture into the mashed potatoes with salt and vanilla.
5. Mix well until no visible sugar remains.
6. Sift confectioners' sugar.
7. Add sugar gradually, blending until smooth and glossy.
8. Knead with hands coated in butter until the dough is smooth, glossy, and pliable, with no crumbs remaining.
9. Press into a buttered 8-inch square pan or shape into balls and top each ball with a nutmeat.
